description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stereo speaker cabinet with a dark woodgrain finish on its sides, top, and back. The front face features three circular speaker elements: a large woofer at the bottom, a smaller midrange driver above it, and a tweeter at the top, all set into a black panel. The back of the cabinet includes a recessed connection panel with visible terminals for speaker wire connections. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the wood texture. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for home audio or public address use. The object appears robust and is likely constructed from wood or MDF with metal and plastic components for the speaker drivers and connectors.
description: A tall, rectangular stereo speaker with a dark woodgrain finish, featuring three circular speaker drivers on the front and a connection panel on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows three circular speaker drivers of varying sizes set into a black panel.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, dark woodgrain surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a woodgrain surface with a recessed connection panel near the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing only the woodgrain finish.
